title: Remove admin role gate from Admin panel

requirements.summary: Remove the administrator role/authentication guard from AdminPanel so /admin is directly accessible without authentication checks
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin loads the AdminPanel component immediately without any authentication prompt.
The 'Access Denied' screen with the shield icon is never shown when visiting /admin.
No role check or Internet Identity login is required to view the admin panel.
All admin sections (Dashboard, Users, Technicians, Bookings, Services, Reports) remain fully functional after removing the gate.
The 'Back to home' fallback screen is removed or unreachable via /admin.

file_operations.description: Remove all authentication and admin role checks from the AdminPanel component. Eliminate conditional rendering that shows 'Access Denied' screens or redirects users away from the admin panel. Remove dependencies on useInternetIdentity identity state and isCallerAdmin query. Ensure the component directly renders the AdminLayout with section management UI for any visitor to /admin, without any authentication barriers.
